Bash(/c/Python314/python.exe -c "
import paramiko, sys, io, time
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)
SSH_HOST = '64.235.43.187'; SSH_USER = 'root'; SSH_PASS = '6BH07w0xB48?~kW-F'
client = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
client.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
client.connect\(SSH_HOST, username=SSH_USER, password=SSH_PASS, timeout=120\)

def run_live\(cmd, label\):
    print\(f'=== {label} ==='\)
    chan = client.get_transport\(\).open_session\(\)
    chan.exec_command\(cmd\)
    while True:
        if chan.recv_ready\(\):
            sys.stdout.write\(chan.recv\(4096\).decode\('utf-8','replace'\)\); sys.stdout.flush\(\)
        if chan.exit_status_ready\(\): break
        time.sleep\(0.5\)
    code = chan.recv_exit_status\(\)
    print\(f'Exit: {code}'\)
    return code

run_live\('cd /var/www/html/enterprise/api && npx nest build 2>&1', 'API Build'\)
client.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python - << 'EOF'
import paramiko, sys, time

HOST = "64.235.43.187"
USER = "root"
PASSWORD = "6BH07w0xB48?~kW-F"

ssh = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
ssh.connect\(HOST, username=USER, password=PASSWORD, timeout=30\)

def run_simple\(cmd\):
    _, stdout, _ = ssh.exec_command\(cmd\)
    out = stdout.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    rc = stdout.channel.recv_exit_status\(\)
    return rc, out

# Force remove the problematic .next directory
run_simple\("rm -rf /var/www/html/enterprise/frontend/.next"\)
print\("Cleaned .next"\)

# Remove old exit/log files
run_simple\("rm -f /tmp/fe_build.log /tmp/fe_build_exit"\)

# Launch build
run_simple\("nohup bash -c 'cd /var/www/html/enterprise/frontend && npm run build > /tmp/fe_build.log 2>&1; echo $? > /tmp/fe_build_exit' &"\)
print\("Build started"\)

for i in range\(60\):
    time.sleep\(10\)
    rc2, exit_content = run_simple\("cat /tmp/fe_build_exit 2>/dev/null"\)
    if exit_content.strip\(\):
        exit_code = exit_content.strip\(\)
        print\(f"Build finished: exit {exit_code}"\)
        _, log = run_simple\("tail -20 /tmp/fe_build.log"\)
        print\(log\)
        break
    else:
        _, progress = run_simple\("tail -1 /tmp/fe_build.log 2>/dev/null"\)
        print\(f"[{\(i+1\)*10}s] {progress.strip\(\)[-80:] if progress.strip\(\) else 'building...'}"\)

if exit_code != '0':
    print\("FAILED"\); ssh.close\(\); sys.exit\(1\)

run_simple\("pm2 start vab-frontend"\)
time.sleep\(3\)
_, status = run_simple\("pm2 status 2>&1 | grep vab-front"\)
print\(status\)

ssh.close\(\)
print\("=== Done ==="\)
EOF)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python - << 'EOF'
import paramiko, sys, time

HOST = "64.235.43.187"
USER = "root"
PASSWORD = "6BH07w0xB48?~kW-F"
REMOTE_API = "/var/www/html/enterprise/api"
REMOTE_FE  = "/var/www/html/enterprise/frontend"

ssh = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
ssh.connect\(HOST, username=USER, password=PASSWORD, timeout=30\)
sftp = ssh.open_sftp\(\)

files = [
    \("C:/Users/UNITECH2/Desktop/enterprise/API/src/modules/quotations/quotations.service.ts",
     f"{REMOTE_API}/src/modules/quotations/quotations.service.ts"\),
    \("C:/Users/UNITECH2/Desktop/enterprise/Frontend/src/app/\(dashboard\)/enquiries/[id]/page.tsx",
     f"{REMOTE_FE}/src/app/\(dashboard\)/enquiries/[id]/page.tsx"\),
]
for local, remote in files:
    sftp.put\(local, remote\)
    print\(f"uploaded: {remote}"\)
sftp.close\(\)

def run_simple\(cmd\):
    _, stdout, _ = ssh.exec_command\(cmd\)
    out = stdout.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    rc = stdout.channel.recv_exit_status\(\)
    return rc, out

# Build API
print\("\\n=== Building API ==="\)
rc, out = run_simple\("cd /var/www/html/enterprise/api && npx nest build 2>&1"\)
print\(out[-500:] if len\(out\) > 500 else out\)
if rc != 0:
    print\("API BUILD FAILED"\); ssh.close\(\); sys.exit\(1\)
print\(f"[exit {rc}]"\)

# Build Frontend in background
run_simple\("rm -rf /var/www/html/enterprise/frontend/.next /tmp/fe_build.log /tmp/fe_build_exit"\)
run_simple\("pm2 stop vab-frontend"\)
run_simple\("nohup bash -c 'cd /var/www/html/enterprise/frontend && npm run build > /tmp/fe_build.log 2>&1; echo $? > /tmp/fe_build_exit' &"\)
print\("\\n=== Frontend build started in background, polling... ==="\)

for i in range\(60\):
    time.sleep\(10\)
    _, exit_content = run_simple\("cat /tmp/fe_build_exit 2>/dev/null"\)
    if exit_content.strip\(\):
        exit_code = exit_content.strip\(\)
        _, log = run_simple\("tail -5 /tmp/fe_build.log"\)
        print\(log\)
        print\(f"Build exit: {exit_code}"\)
        break
    _, progress = run_simple\("tail -1 /tmp/fe_build.log 2>/dev/null"\)
    print\(f"[{\(i+1\)*10}s] {progress.strip\(\)[-80:]}"\)

if exit_code != '0':
    _, full_log = run_simple\("tail -30 /tmp/fe_build.log"\)
    print\(full_log\)
    print\("FRONTEND BUILD FAILED"\); ssh.close\(\); sys.exit\(1\)

# Restart PM2
run_simple\("pm2 restart vab-api && pm2 start vab-frontend"\)
time.sleep\(3\)
_, status = run_simple\("pm2 status 2>&1 | grep -E 'vab-api|vab-front'"\)
print\(status\)

ssh.close\(\)
print\("\\n=== Deployment complete! ==="\)
EOF)
